content.full_text:
July 7, 1992

John Wallace
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear John:

This letter will confirm our conversation today regarding acceptance and reporting of gifts from constituents.

To summarize, I have been offered tickets to the Pigskin Classic at Anaheim Stadium by a constituent, in appreciation for my assistance with her child support case. You advised me over the phone that it would be proper to accept them, as long as the tickets cost less than $250.00. If the tickets cost over $50.00, I would have to report it on my next filing statement with your office. Also, if I paid for one of the tickets, which would bring the cost of the gift under $50.00, I would not have to report it at all.

Please send me a confirmatory memorandum, addressing and clarifying what I have mentioned above. Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Steven N. Brody
Field Representative
